title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple pull/run workflow.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for chat, generate, embed, pull and list operations.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers, published on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration package letting you use Ollama models as LLM or embeddings in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG and user auth.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Community npm package that exposes a friendly command-line wrapper around the Ollama REST endpoints.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector and PVC caching.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama (Kotlin friendly) published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models through slash commands.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET SDK for Ollama with async APIs and dependency injection helpers.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Lightweight Rust crate wrapping the Ollama HTTP API with tokio and serde.

title: ollama-models
summary: Curated registry of Modelfile recipes for community-tuned Llama, Mistral, CodeLlama and vision variants.

title: ollama-gpt4all-bridge
summary: Experimental bridge that lets GPT4All models run inside Ollama’s inference server.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for chatting with local models in workspaces.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.
